title: VACUUM corrupts database when MAIN and TEMP table names overlap.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE main_table (id UInt64, name String, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table (id UInt64, name String, value Int32 DEFAULT 1) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
key_bug_features: MAIN and TEMP table names overlap during VACUUM
